rpc.analytics.balance_quality.description: Returns the stored balance-quality snapshot (objective score, SR spread, discomfort, per-player rows) for a tournament, or null if none exists.

rpc.analytics.create_job.description: Creates an analytics job and enqueues it to the worker, returning 202; gates by kind (compute=workspace analytics.update, train_ml=superuser), 409 on an active-job conflict.

rpc.analytics.feedback_submit.description: Upserts a reviewer verdict/note for a player anomaly and returns the saved row; requires analytics.update.

rpc.analytics.get_algorithm.description: Returns a single analytics algorithm by id.

rpc.analytics.get_analytics.description: Returns per-team analytics (players, wins/losses, shifts) for a tournament and required algorithm; 404 if the algorithm is missing.

rpc.analytics.get_streaks.description: Returns players' placement streaks across recent tournaments for the given tournament_id.

rpc.analytics.infer.description: Dispatches a 202 ML inference job for a tournament to the worker queue; requires analytics.update and configured RabbitMQ (503 otherwise).

rpc.analytics.jobs_active.description: Returns the currently active analytics job for the optional workspace_id, or null if none; requires analytics.read.

rpc.analytics.jobs_get.description: Returns a single analytics job by id; 404 if not found; requires analytics.read.

rpc.analytics.jobs_list.description: Returns recent analytics jobs (default limit 20), optionally scoped by workspace_id and active_only; requires analytics.read.

rpc.analytics.list_algorithms.description: Returns a paginated list of analytics algorithms, optionally filtered by tournament_id.

rpc.analytics.openskill.description: Deprecated OpenSkill v1 endpoint; validates tournament/workspace then always returns 410 gone, directing callers to run the unified analytics job.

rpc.analytics.points.description: Creates a 202 async compute job scoped to the Points algorithm for the required tournament_id.

rpc.analytics.recalculate.description: Creates a 202 async compute job for a tournament (optionally scoped to given algorithm_ids), replacing the legacy synchronous recompute.

rpc.analytics.shift.description: Applies a manual shift override for a player and returns recomputed player analytics; requires analytics.update.

rpc.analytics.train.description: Dispatches a 202 ML training job to the worker queue; requires analytics.update and configured RabbitMQ (503 otherwise).

rpc.analytics.v2_artifacts.description: Returns ML model artifacts ordered by creation, optionally filtered by model_kind and active_only; requires analytics.read.

rpc.analytics.v2_explain.description: Returns the most recent explanation row for a player in a tournament (optionally by algorithm_id); 404 if none found; requires analytics.read.

rpc.analytics.v2_feedback_list.description: Returns all anomaly-feedback rows recorded for a tournament; requires analytics.read.

rpc.analytics.v2_match_quality.description: Returns per-encounter match-quality rows for a tournament, optionally filtered by algorithm_id; requires analytics.read.

rpc.analytics.v2_performance.description: Returns ML performance rows for a tournament, optionally filtered by algorithm_id; requires analytics.read.

rpc.analytics.v2_player_anomalies.description: Returns player-anomaly rows for a tournament, optionally filtered by player_id and kind; requires analytics.read.

rpc.analytics.v2_standings.description: Returns standings-distribution rows for a tournament, optionally filtered by algorithm_id; requires analytics.read.

rpc.app.achievements.user.description: Returns a player's earned (and optionally locked) achievements, scoped by tournament or without-tournament and workspace; rejects combining tournament_id with without_tournament=true (public).

rpc.app.achievements.users.description: Returns a paginated list of players who earned a given achievement (public).

rpc.app.admin.delete#workspace.description: Deletes a workspace via the shared CRUD engine with workspace-scoped 'workspace.delete' permission; returns 204, 404 if not found.

rpc.app.admin.update#workspace.description: Updates a workspace via the shared CRUD engine with workspace-scoped 'workspace.update' permission, 404 if not found.

rpc.app.assets.delete.description: Deletes an achievements/divisions asset from S3 by slug prefix (superuser only); 422 on invalid asset_type, 404 if nothing deleted.

rpc.app.assets.upload.description: Uploads an achievements/divisions asset to S3 (superuser only), optionally workspace-scoped, returning its key and public URL; 422 on invalid asset_type.

rpc.app.gamemodes.admin_create.description: Creates a gamemode; requires the global gamemode.create permission.

rpc.app.gamemodes.admin_delete.description: Deletes a gamemode by id; requires the global gamemode.delete permission, returns 204.

rpc.app.gamemodes.admin_list.description: Returns a paginated admin list of gamemodes; requires the global gamemode.read permission.

rpc.app.gamemodes.admin_update.description: Updates a gamemode by id; requires the global gamemode.update permission.

rpc.app.gamemodes.lookup.description: Returns all gamemodes as id/name lookup items ordered by name (public, no pagination).

rpc.app.heroes.admin_create.description: Creates a hero; requires the global hero.create permission.

rpc.app.heroes.admin_delete.description: Deletes a hero by id; requires the global hero.delete permission, returns 204.

rpc.app.heroes.admin_list.description: Returns a paginated admin list of heroes; requires the global hero.read permission.

rpc.app.heroes.admin_update.description: Updates a hero by id; requires the global hero.update permission.

rpc.app.heroes.leaderboard.description: Returns a paginated per-hero player leaderboard resolved against the workspace context and its division grid (public).

rpc.app.heroes.lookup.description: Returns all heroes as id/name lookup items ordered by name (public, no pagination).

rpc.app.heroes.playtime.description: Returns paginated aggregated hero-playtime statistics, optionally scoped to a workspace (public).

rpc.app.maps.admin_create.description: Creates a map; requires the global map.create permission.

rpc.app.maps.admin_delete.description: Deletes a map by id; requires the global map.delete permission, returns 204.

rpc.app.maps.admin_list.description: Returns a paginated admin list of maps; requires the global map.read permission.

rpc.app.maps.admin_update.description: Updates a map by id; requires the global map.update permission.

rpc.app.maps.lookup.description: Returns all maps as id/name lookup items ordered by name (public, no pagination).

rpc.app.matches.log.description: Returns the raw match-log file bytes for a match (base64 from the worker, decoded by the gateway); 404 if the match or log is missing.

rpc.app.read.get#achievement.description: Returns a single achievement rule by id with optional entity expansion (public read via the shared CRUD engine), 404 if not found.

rpc.app.read.get#gamemode.description: Returns a single gamemode by id with optional entity expansion (public read via the shared CRUD engine), 404 if not found.

rpc.app.read.get#hero.description: Returns a single hero by id (public read via the shared CRUD engine), 404 if not found.

rpc.app.read.get#map.description: Returns a single map by id with optional entity expansion (public read via the shared CRUD engine), 404 if not found.

rpc.app.read.list#achievement.description: Returns a paginated, sortable list of achievements optionally filtered by workspace (public read via the shared CRUD engine).

rpc.app.read.list#gamemode.description: Returns a paginated, sortable, name/slug-searchable list of gamemodes (public read via the shared CRUD engine).

rpc.app.read.list#hero.description: Returns a paginated, sortable, name/slug-searchable list of heroes (public read via the shared CRUD engine).

rpc.app.read.list#map.description: Returns a paginated, sortable, name-searchable list of maps (public read via the shared CRUD engine).

rpc.app.statistics.champion.description: Returns paginated, sortable players ranked by tournaments won, optionally workspace-scoped (public).

rpc.app.statistics.dashboard.description: Returns aggregate dashboard statistics for the optional workspace (public).

rpc.app.statistics.winrate.description: Returns paginated, sortable players ranked by win rate, optionally workspace-scoped (public).

rpc.app.statistics.won_maps.description: Returns paginated, sortable players ranked by maps won, optionally workspace-scoped (public).

rpc.app.users.admin_create.description: Creates a player and returns it with discord/battle_tag/twitch identities; requires the global user.create permission.

rpc.app.users.admin_delete.description: Deletes a player by id; requires the global user.delete permission, returns 204.

rpc.app.users.admin_list.description: Returns a paginated admin list of users; requires the global user.read permission.

rpc.app.users.admin_update.description: Updates a player by id and returns it with its identities; requires the global user.update permission.

rpc.app.users.avatar_delete.description: Removes a player's avatar from S3 and clears its URL; requires the global user.update permission.

rpc.app.users.avatar_upload.description: Uploads a player's avatar to S3 and stores its URL; requires the global user.update permission.

rpc.app.users.battletag_add.description: Adds a BattleTag identity to a player; requires the global user.update permission.

rpc.app.users.battletag_delete.description: Removes a player's BattleTag identity by identity id; requires the global user.delete permission, returns 204.

rpc.app.users.battletag_update.description: Updates a player's BattleTag identity by identity id; requires the global user.update permission.

rpc.app.users.by_name.description: Resolves a player by BattleTag (name containing '#', dashes normalized) or by Discord name with optional entity expansion (public).

rpc.app.users.compare.description: Returns a head-to-head comparison between the given user and others, resolved against the default division grid (public).

rpc.app.users.compare_heroes.description: Returns a per-hero head-to-head comparison for the given user against others using the default grid (public).

rpc.app.users.csv_import.description: Bulk-creates players from an uploaded CSV file or a Google Sheets URL using the given row/delimiter/flag params; requires the global admin role.

rpc.app.users.discord_add.description: Adds a Discord identity to a player; requires the global user.update permission.

rpc.app.users.discord_delete.description: Removes a player's Discord identity by identity id; requires the global user.delete permission, returns 204.

rpc.app.users.discord_update.description: Updates a player's Discord identity by identity id; requires the global user.update permission.

rpc.app.users.encounters.description: Returns a player's paginated encounters filterable by result, stage, MVP, log availability, and opponent (public).

rpc.app.users.get_profile.description: Returns a player's full profile resolved against the workspace context and division grid (public).

rpc.app.users.heroes.description: Returns a player's paginated per-hero stats for the requested stat names, optionally scoped to a tournament and workspace; rejects invalid stat values with 422 (public).

rpc.app.users.list.description: Returns a paginated, sortable, name-searchable list of players (public).

rpc.app.users.maps.description: Returns a player's paginated, sortable per-map record (win/loss/draw/winrate), optionally workspace-scoped (public).

rpc.app.users.maps_summary.description: Returns aggregate totals for a player's per-map record, optionally workspace-scoped (public).

rpc.app.users.matches_summary.description: Returns aggregate match totals for a player, optionally workspace-scoped (public).

rpc.app.users.merge_execute.description: Merges one player profile into another, stamping the operator's auth-user id (superuser only).

rpc.app.users.merge_preview.description: Previews merging one player profile into another without applying changes (superuser only).

rpc.app.users.overview.description: Returns a paginated, workspace-normalized player overview table built from the workspace grid (public).

rpc.app.users.overview_catalog.description: Returns the filter-catalog (facets) for the players-overview table from the workspace grid (public).

rpc.app.users.overview_stats.description: Returns aggregate statistics for the players-overview table computed against the workspace grid (public).

rpc.app.users.search.description: Returns players matching a free-text query across the requested identity fields (public).

rpc.app.users.teammates.description: Returns a player's paginated, sortable best teammates by winrate and shared tournaments, optionally workspace-scoped (public).

rpc.app.users.tournament.description: Returns a player's participation and stats for one tournament, resolved against that tournament's division grid (public).

rpc.app.users.tournament_leaderboard.description: Returns every player in a tournament ranked by a single stat — the full ranked list behind a user's per-stat rank/total on the tournament-stats page. Inverse stats like Deaths rank ascending. The `stat` must be one of the ranked tournament stats (public).

rpc.app.users.tournaments.description: Returns the tournaments a player participated in, scoped to the workspace context and grid (public).

rpc.app.users.twitch_add.description: Adds a Twitch identity to a player; requires the global user.update permission.

rpc.app.users.twitch_delete.description: Removes a player's Twitch identity by identity id; requires the global user.delete permission, returns 204.

rpc.app.users.twitch_update.description: Updates a player's Twitch identity by identity id; requires the global user.update permission.

rpc.app.workspaces.clear_custom_domain.description: Removes the custom domain, its verification token, and verified_at; requires workspace.update, 404 if workspace missing.

rpc.app.workspaces.create.description: Creates a workspace (superuser only), provisions system roles, adds the creator as owner, and busts the RBAC cache; 400 on duplicate slug.

rpc.app.workspaces.get.description: Returns a single workspace by id (public), 404 if not found.

rpc.app.workspaces.icon_delete.description: Removes a workspace's icon from S3 and clears its URL; requires workspace.update, 404 if workspace missing.

rpc.app.workspaces.icon_upload.description: Uploads a workspace icon to S3 and stores its URL; requires workspace.update, 404 if workspace missing.

rpc.app.workspaces.member_add.description: Adds an auth user to a workspace with resolved role ids and busts the member's RBAC cache; requires workspace_member.create, 400 if already a member.

rpc.app.workspaces.member_remove.description: Removes a member from a workspace and busts their RBAC cache; requires workspace_member.delete, refuses to remove the last owner, returns 204.

rpc.app.workspaces.member_update.description: Updates a member's workspace roles and busts their RBAC cache; requires workspace_member.update, 404 if member missing.

rpc.app.workspaces.members_autofill_role.description: Grants the baseline 'member' role to every auth-linked member of the workspace that currently has no role; idempotent. Requires workspace_member.update, returns the count assigned.

rpc.app.workspaces.members_list.description: Paginated, searchable (username/email) list of a workspace's auth-linked members enriched with auth-user info and RBAC roles; requires workspace_member.read, 404 if workspace missing.

rpc.app.workspaces.set_custom_domain.description: Normalizes and stores a custom domain plus a fresh DNS TXT verification token, resetting verification; requires workspace.update, 404 if workspace missing, 400 on an invalid domain.

rpc.app.workspaces.verify_custom_domain.description: Checks the `_owt-verify.<domain>` DNS TXT record against the stored token and stamps verified_at on a match; requires workspace.update, 404 if workspace missing, 400 if no domain is set or the record doesn't match yet.

rpc.balancer.admin.balance_export.description: Materializes a saved balance into tournament teams, returning removed/imported counts and emitting a teams-changed realtime event.

rpc.balancer.admin.balance_get.description: Returns the saved team balance for a tournament for admins with workspace team-read permission, or null when none exists.

rpc.balancer.admin.balance_save.description: Persists a computed team balance for the tournament (requires workspace team-import) and emits a balance-saved realtime event.

rpc.balancer.admin.teams_import.description: Bulk-imports tournament teams from a multipart JSON upload (atravkovs or internal format, auto-detected) and emits a teams-changed realtime event.

rpc.balancer.admin.tournament_config_get.description: Returns the per-tournament balancer config for admins with workspace team-read permission, or null when none is set.

rpc.balancer.admin.tournament_config_ups.description: Creates or updates the per-tournament balancer config (requires workspace team-import) and emits a balancer config-changed realtime event.

rpc.balancer.admin.workspace_config_get.description: Returns the workspace-level balancer config (rank-delta threshold and pool-hide flag) for members with workspace read permission.

rpc.balancer.admin.workspace_config_upse.description: Creates or updates the workspace-level rank-delta threshold and hide-from-pool settings, requiring workspace admin permission.

rpc.balancer.config.description: Returns the public balancer configuration (ranks, roles, defaults) with no authentication required.

rpc.balancer.draft.cancel.description: Cancels the draft (requires team-import) and publishes a draft-cancelled realtime event.

rpc.balancer.draft.export.description: Finalizes the drafted rosters into tournament teams (requires team-import) and publishes a draft-completed realtime event.

rpc.balancer.draft.feasibility.description: Reports whether every remaining team-role slot can be filled. Requires workspace team-import permission.

rpc.balancer.draft.pause.description: Pauses an in-progress draft (requires team-import) and publishes a draft-paused realtime event.

rpc.balancer.draft.pick_autopick.description: Auto-selects the best-fit available player for a pick using the session's autopick strategy (requires team-import) and broadcasts the result.

rpc.balancer.draft.pick_options.description: Returns safe and blocked player-role choices for the current pick. Available only to the on-clock captain or a workspace admin.

rpc.balancer.draft.pick_override.description: Admin-overrides a pick to an arbitrary player (requires team-import), bypassing captain/clock constraints, and broadcasts a pick-made event.

rpc.balancer.draft.pick_select.description: Makes a pick for the current slot as the on-clock captain (or admin), enforcing role fit and optimistic version, then broadcasts pick-made/next-pick events.

rpc.balancer.draft.player_role_edit.description: Previews or commits an emergency role addition to the draft snapshot with optimistic versioning and private audit reason. Requires workspace team-import permission.
rpc.balancer.draft.player_role_edit.summary: Preview or add a draft player role

rpc.balancer.draft.resume.description: Resumes a paused draft (requires team-import) and publishes a draft-resumed realtime event.

rpc.balancer.draft.rollback.description: Rolls back the most recent draft action (requires team-import) and publishes a rollback realtime event.

rpc.balancer.draft.seed.description: Seeds a draft session with captains and players from the balancer pool or a manual list (requires team-import); 422 if neither is provided.

rpc.balancer.draft.session_board.description: Returns the full draft board snapshot (teams, picks, pool) for a given session id, with no authentication required.

rpc.balancer.draft.session_create.description: Creates a new draft session for a tournament (requires workspace team-import) and publishes a session-updated realtime event.

rpc.balancer.draft.session_get.description: Returns a single draft session by id for spectating, with no authentication required.

rpc.balancer.draft.session_patch.description: Updates mutable draft settings (pick time, autopick strategy, override flag, rounds, settings) before the draft starts, requiring team-import.

rpc.balancer.draft.start.description: Starts the draft and opens the first pick (requires team-import), publishing a pick-started realtime event with the clock deadline.

rpc.balancer.draft.suggestions.description: Ranks the top five available players by fit for the current pick (requires workspace team-read); 409 if the draft has no current pick.

rpc.balancer.draft.tournament_board.description: Returns the live draft board snapshot for a tournament's active session (no auth), or null when no session is active.

rpc.balancer.jobs.create.description: Queues an asynchronous balance job from a multipart player-data upload plus optional config overrides, returning 202 with the job id.

rpc.balancer.jobs.result.description: Returns the computed result of a completed balance job by its uuid, scoped to the requesting token or API key.

rpc.balancer.jobs.status.description: Returns the current status of a balance job by its uuid, scoped to the requesting access token or workspace API key.

rpc.identity.create_api_key.description: Creates a workspace-scoped API key for the active user and returns it including the one-time plaintext key (201).

rpc.identity.get_me.description: Returns the profile of the bearer-authenticated user.

rpc.identity.invalidate_session.description: Service-token-authenticated call that revokes all sessions for the given user_id; returns 204 No Content.

rpc.identity.link_complete.description: Redeems a pending-link ticket minted by rpc.identity.oauth_link and attaches the provider identity it carries to the bearer-authenticated caller; 400 if the ticket is invalid, expired, or already used.

rpc.identity.list_api_keys.description: Returns the active user's API keys for the given workspace_id (422 if workspace_id is missing).

rpc.identity.list_sessions.description: Returns all active refresh-token sessions for the bearer-authenticated user.

rpc.identity.login.description: Authenticates email + password and returns an access+refresh token, recording the session with the forwarded user-agent and IP.

rpc.identity.logout.description: Revokes the supplied refresh token for the bearer-authenticated user; returns 204 No Content.

rpc.identity.logout_all.description: Revokes every refresh-token session for the active user; returns 204 No Content.

rpc.identity.me.avatar_delete.description: Removes the active user's avatar from S3 and returns the updated user.

rpc.identity.me.avatar_set.description: Uploads the active user's avatar image to S3 (base64 multipart body) and returns the updated user.

rpc.identity.oauth_callback.description: Exchanges the provider's code+state for an access+refresh token, logging in or creating the user; 422 if provider/code/state are missing.

rpc.identity.oauth_connections.description: Returns the OAuth provider connections linked to the active user.

rpc.identity.oauth_link.description: Exchanges the provider code+state and links the connection to the active user (platform apex/subdomain), or -- for a workspace custom domain, which has no live session here -- mints a single-use provider-identity ticket (mode='link_ticket') for rpc.identity.link_complete to redeem instead.

rpc.identity.oauth_providers.description: Returns the configured OAuth providers and their availability.

rpc.identity.oauth_unlink.description: Unlinks the named OAuth provider from the active user; returns 204 and refuses to remove the last provider when no password is set.

rpc.identity.oauth_url.description: Returns the provider's authorization redirect URL to start the OAuth flow; 400 if the provider is missing.

rpc.identity.player.link.description: Links a game player to the active user and returns the link details (201).

rpc.identity.player.linked.description: Returns all game players linked to the active user.

rpc.identity.player.set_primary.description: Marks a linked player as the active user's primary player and returns the updated link.

rpc.identity.player.unlink.description: Unlinks a game player from the active user by player_id; returns 204 No Content.

rpc.identity.rbac.assign_linked_player.description: Links a game player to the given auth user (admin); returns 204 No Content.

rpc.identity.rbac.assign_role.description: Assigns a role to a user and invalidates the RBAC cache; returns 204 No Content.

rpc.identity.rbac.create_permission.description: Creates a new RBAC permission and returns it (201), enforcing the active user's permission check.

rpc.identity.rbac.create_role.description: Creates a new RBAC role and returns it (201), enforcing the active user's permission check.

rpc.identity.rbac.delete_oauth_connectio.description: Deletes an OAuth connection by connection_id (admin); returns 204 No Content.

rpc.identity.rbac.delete_permission.description: Deletes the RBAC permission by id; returns 204 No Content.

rpc.identity.rbac.delete_role.description: Deletes the role by role_id; returns 204 No Content.

rpc.identity.rbac.get_auth_user.description: Returns detailed info for a single auth user by user_id (422 if user_id is missing).

rpc.identity.rbac.get_role.description: Returns a single role with its permissions by role_id (422 if role_id is missing).

rpc.identity.rbac.get_user_roles.description: Returns the roles assigned to the given user_id.

rpc.identity.rbac.list_auth_users.description: Returns auth users filtered by search/role_id/is_active/is_superuser/workspace_id, after the active user's permission check.

rpc.identity.rbac.list_oauth_connections.description: Returns all OAuth connections (admin), optionally filtered by search and provider.

rpc.identity.rbac.list_permissions.description: Returns RBAC permissions, optionally filtered by workspace_id, after the active user's permission check.

rpc.identity.rbac.list_roles.description: Returns RBAC roles, optionally filtered by workspace_id, after the active user's permission check.

rpc.identity.rbac.list_sessions.description: Returns auth-user sessions (admin), filterable by user_id/search and status (active/revoked/expired).

rpc.identity.rbac.remove_linked_player.description: Removes a linked game player from the given auth user (admin) by user_id/player_id; returns 204 No Content.

rpc.identity.rbac.remove_role.description: Removes a role from a user and invalidates the RBAC cache; returns 204 No Content.

rpc.identity.rbac.update_role.description: Updates the role by role_id and returns it, invalidating the RBAC cache.

rpc.identity.refresh.description: Rotates a valid refresh token and returns a fresh access+refresh token pair.

rpc.identity.register.description: Creates a new auth user from email/password registration and returns the created user (201).

rpc.identity.revoke_api_key.description: Revokes the active user's API key by id; returns 204 No Content.

rpc.identity.revoke_session.description: Revokes one of the active user's sessions by session id; returns 204 No Content (400 on an invalid session id).

rpc.identity.service_token.description: Exchanges service client credentials (client_id + client_secret) for a signed service access token.

rpc.identity.set_password.description: Sets or changes the active user's password; returns 204 No Content.

rpc.identity.update_api_key.description: Updates the named API key (by id) for the active user and returns the updated record.

rpc.identity.update_me.description: Applies a partial profile update to the active user and returns the updated user.

rpc.identity.validate_service_token.description: Validates a service JWT and returns the service token payload; 401 if the service token is missing or invalid.

rpc.identity.validate_token.description: Validates a bearer access token or API key and returns the RBAC token payload (user, permissions); 403 if not authenticated.

rpc.parser.ach.calculate.description: Runs the achievement condition-tree engine across a workspace (optionally seeding rules and scoping to specific slugs); requires the global admin role.

rpc.parser.ach.calculate_tournament.description: Runs the achievement engine for a single tournament's workspace; requires the global admin role.

rpc.parser.ach.condition_types.description: Returns the catalog of available achievement condition-tree leaf types with their grain; requires workspace achievement.read.

rpc.parser.ach.create.description: Creates a workspace achievement rule after validating its condition tree and enforcing slug uniqueness; requires workspace achievement.create.

rpc.parser.ach.delete.description: Deletes a workspace achievement rule; requires workspace achievement.delete.

rpc.parser.ach.evaluate.description: Triggers a manual achievement evaluation run for selected rules and/or a tournament; requires workspace achievement.calculate.

rpc.parser.ach.export.description: Returns a portable JSON export payload of all of a workspace's achievement rules; requires workspace achievement.export.

rpc.parser.ach.get.description: Returns a single achievement rule scoped to the workspace; requires workspace achievement.read.

rpc.parser.ach.import.description: Imports portable achievement rules into a workspace (with source-workspace access check) and returns the import result; requires workspace achievement.import.

rpc.parser.ach.lib_import.description: Imports selected achievement rules from a source workspace's library into the target workspace, warning on missing slugs; requires workspace achievement.import.

rpc.parser.ach.lib_list.description: Lists the achievement rules of a source workspace available for library import; requires workspace achievement.read.

rpc.parser.ach.lib_workspaces.description: Lists other workspaces (visible to the caller) that have achievement rules available to import as a library; requires workspace achievement.read.

rpc.parser.ach.list.description: Lists a workspace's achievement rules filtered by category and enabled flag; requires workspace achievement.read.

rpc.parser.ach.override_create.description: Creates a manual achievement override (grant or revoke) for a user on a rule, stamped with the granting actor; requires workspace achievement.update.

rpc.parser.ach.override_delete.description: Deletes a manual achievement override scoped to the workspace; requires workspace achievement.update.

rpc.parser.ach.overrides_list.description: Lists manual grant/revoke achievement overrides for a workspace; requires workspace achievement.read.

rpc.parser.ach.reset.description: Hard-resets a workspace by reseeding rules and clearing evaluation results, returning the new run; requires workspace achievement.update.

rpc.parser.ach.rule_users.description: Returns a paginated, sortable list of users who earned a rule's achievement with counts and first-qualified timestamps; requires workspace achievement.read.

rpc.parser.ach.runs.description: Returns the 50 most recent achievement evaluation runs for a workspace; requires workspace achievement.read.

rpc.parser.ach.seed.description: Seeds the built-in achievement rules into a workspace and returns seeded/removed counts; requires workspace achievement.create.

rpc.parser.ach.test.description: Dry-runs a rule's condition tree against an optional tournament and returns the qualifying count plus a sample of results; requires workspace achievement.calculate.

rpc.parser.ach.update.description: Updates an achievement rule, revalidating and bumping its version on condition-tree change and re-running evaluation when enabled; requires workspace achievement.update.

rpc.parser.ach.validate.description: Validates an achievement condition tree and returns errors plus the inferred grain; requires workspace achievement.read.

rpc.parser.discord_channel.delete.description: Removes a tournament's Discord channel configuration; requires discord_channel.delete on the workspace.

rpc.parser.discord_channel.get.description: Returns the Discord channel configuration for a tournament (or null); requires discord_channel.read on the workspace.

rpc.parser.discord_channel.upsert.description: Creates or updates a tournament's Discord guild/channel binding; requires discord_channel.update on the workspace.

rpc.parser.encounter.create_challonge.description: Bulk-creates a tournament's encounters from its Challonge bracket, optionally skipping finals; requires the global admin role.

rpc.parser.logs.history.description: Lists match-log processing records filtered by tournament, encounter or workspace with pagination; permission is gated per filter argument.

rpc.parser.logs.process_tournament.description: Enqueues processing of all stored match logs for a tournament; requires the global admin role.

rpc.parser.logs.queue_status.description: Returns per-status counts of match-log processing records; admin-only (requires log.read permission).

rpc.parser.logs.retry.description: Resets a failed/processed log record to pending and re-enqueues it for processing; requires log.reprocess on the record's workspace.

rpc.parser.logs.upload.description: Multipart (base64) upload of one or more log files for a tournament, storing each to S3 and enqueueing processing, with per-file errors collected; requires log.upload.

rpc.parser.metadata.sync_gamemodes.description: Syncs gamemode metadata from OverFast into the database and acks success; requires gamemode.sync permission.

rpc.parser.metadata.sync_heroes.description: Syncs hero metadata from OverFast into the database and acks success; requires hero.sync permission.

rpc.parser.metadata.sync_maps.description: Syncs map metadata from OverFast into the database and acks success; requires map.sync permission.

rpc.parser.rank.battle_tag_history.description: Returns a single battle tag's OverFast rank time series with granularity, date range, platform and role filters; public read.

rpc.parser.rank.collect.description: Enqueues an OverFast rank-collection run for a user or specific battle tags and returns the enqueued count; requires the global admin role.

rpc.parser.rank.fetch_log.description: Lists OverFast rank-collection fetch-log entries filtered by status, source and cursor; requires the global admin role.

rpc.parser.rank.reenable_disabled.description: Requeues battle tags that were auto-disabled by a transient OverFast outage (status disabled -> pending, failure counter reset), spreading them across the collection interval; optionally limited to tags that previously succeeded. Returns the re-enabled count; requires the global admin role.

rpc.parser.rank.stats.description: Aggregated OverFast rank-collection health: battle-tag state counts by status and priority tier, snapshot coverage over 24h/7d, last successful capture, last-24h fetch-outcome mix with error rate, and the active config; requires the global admin role.

rpc.parser.rank.user_collection.description: Returns the OverFast rank-collection status for each of a user's battle tags; requires the global admin role.

rpc.parser.rank.user_current.description: Returns a user's current OverFast ranks for the requested platform; public read.

rpc.parser.rank.user_history.description: Returns a user's OverFast rank time series with configurable granularity, date range, platform and role filters; public read.

rpc.parser.settings.get.description: Returns a single global setting by key; superuser-only.

rpc.parser.settings.list.description: Returns all global key/value settings; superuser-only.

rpc.parser.settings.upsert.description: Creates or updates a global setting by key, stamping the updating user; superuser-only.

rpc.parser.teams.challonge_preview.description: Previews the mapping of Challonge participants to teams for a tournament before syncing; requires the global admin role.

rpc.parser.teams.create_balancer.description: Multipart (base64) import of teams from a balancer export JSON (atravkovs or internal format) for a tournament; requires the global admin role.

rpc.parser.teams.create_challonge.description: Applies Challonge participant-to-team mappings for a tournament; requires the global admin role.

rpc.parser.tournament.create_with_groups.description: Creates a tournament and its group stages (optionally from a Challonge slug) for a workspace; requires workspace tournament.create.

rpc.tournament.admin.create#encounter.description: Creates an encounter; requires match-create permission on the workspace resolved from the body's tournament_id.

rpc.tournament.admin.create#player.description: Creates a player; requires player-create permission on the workspace resolved from the body's tournament_id.

rpc.tournament.admin.create#player_sub_r.description: Creates a custom player sub-role; requires player-create permission on the workspace supplied in the body.

rpc.tournament.admin.create#stage.description: Creates a stage under a tournament; requires stage-create permission on the workspace resolved from the path tournament_id.

rpc.tournament.admin.create#stage_item.description: Creates a stage item under a stage; requires stage-create permission on the workspace resolved from the path stage_id.

rpc.tournament.admin.create#stage_item_i.description: Creates a stage item input under a stage item; requires stage-create permission on the workspace resolved from the path stage_item_id.

rpc.tournament.admin.create#team.description: Creates a team; requires team-create permission on the workspace resolved from the body's tournament_id.

rpc.tournament.admin.create#tournament.description: Creates a tournament; requires the tournament-create permission on the workspace supplied in the body.

rpc.tournament.admin.delete#encounter.description: Deletes an encounter by id (204 no body); requires match-delete permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.delete#player.description: Deletes a player by id (204 no body); requires player-delete permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.delete#player_sub_r.description: Deactivates a player sub-role by id (204 no body); requires player-delete permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.delete#stage.description: Deletes a stage by id (204 no body); requires stage-delete permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.delete#standing.description: Deletes a standing by id (204 no body); requires standing-delete permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.delete#team.description: Deletes a team by id (204 no body); requires team-delete permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.delete#tournament.description: Deletes a tournament by id (204 no body); requires tournament-delete permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.get#stage.description: Returns one stage by id; requires stage-read permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.get#team.description: Returns one team by id for admin editing; requires team-read permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.get#tournament.description: Returns one tournament by id for admin editing; requires tournament-read permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.list#player_sub_rol.description: Lists a workspace's player sub-roles, optionally filtered by role and including inactive ones; requires player-read permission on the workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.list#stage.description: Lists all stages of a tournament; requires stage-read permission on the workspace resolved from the path tournament_id.

rpc.tournament.admin.update#encounter.description: Updates an encounter by id; requires match-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.update#player.description: Updates a player by id; requires player-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.update#player_sub_r.description: Updates a player sub-role by id; requires player-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.update#stage.description: Updates a stage by id; requires stage-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.update#stage_item.description: Updates a stage item by id; requires stage-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.update#stage_item_i.description: Updates a stage item input by id; requires stage-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.update#standing.description: Updates a standing by id; requires standing-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.update#team.description: Updates a team by id; requires team-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.admin.update#tournament.description: Updates a tournament by id; requires tournament-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.captain_confirm_result.description: Lets the opposing captain confirm a submitted encounter result; requires authentication.

rpc.tournament.captain_dispute_result.description: Lets an encounter captain dispute a submitted result with a reason; requires authentication.

rpc.tournament.captain_map_pool.description: Returns the public map pool for an encounter; no authentication required.

rpc.tournament.captain_map_pool_state.description: Returns the encounter's map-veto state; with optional auth the requesting captain's side is annotated, otherwise viewer_side is null.

rpc.tournament.captain_my_role.description: Returns the calling user's captain side (home/away) for an encounter, or null if they are not a captain; requires authentication.

rpc.tournament.captain_submit_match_repo.description: Lets an encounter captain submit per-match scores and a closeness rating; requires authentication.

rpc.tournament.captain_submit_result.description: Lets an encounter captain submit a home/away score and returns the updated result status; requires authentication.

rpc.tournament.captain_veto.description: Lets a captain ban or pick a map in the encounter's veto and returns the updated pool entry; requires authentication.

rpc.tournament.challonge_export.description: Exports a tournament's bracket to Challonge; requires challonge-sync permission on the tournament.

rpc.tournament.challonge_fetch_matches.description: Fetches a Challonge tournament's matches from the Challonge API; requires the global challonge-read permission.

rpc.tournament.challonge_fetch_participa.description: Fetches a Challonge tournament's participants from the Challonge API; requires the global challonge-read permission.

rpc.tournament.challonge_fetch_tournamen.description: Fetches a Challonge tournament by slug from the Challonge API; requires the global challonge-read permission.

rpc.tournament.challonge_import.description: Imports a tournament's bracket from Challonge, optionally as a dry run; requires challonge-sync permission on the tournament.

rpc.tournament.challonge_push_result.description: Pushes a confirmed encounter result to Challonge and returns a status acknowledgment; requires challonge-sync permission on the encounter.

rpc.tournament.challonge_sync_log.description: Returns recent Challonge sync-log entries for a tournament (limit-bounded); requires challonge-read permission on the tournament.

rpc.tournament.encounters_overview.description: Returns an aggregated encounters overview for the search filters, with viewer-scoped fields resolved from the optional identity.

rpc.tournament.get_encounter.description: Returns one encounter by id with optionally hydrated related entities selected via the entities query param.

rpc.tournament.get_match.description: Returns one match by id with player statistics and optionally hydrated related entities, scoped to the given workspace.

rpc.tournament.get_stages.description: Returns all stages of a tournament ordered by stage order, with their items and item inputs hydrated.

rpc.tournament.get_standings.description: Returns the standings for a tournament with optionally hydrated related entities selected via the entities query param.

rpc.tournament.get_team.description: Returns one team by id with optionally hydrated related entities (players, captain, tournament) selected via the entities query param.

rpc.tournament.get_tournament.description: Returns one tournament by id with optionally hydrated related entities selected via the entities query param.

rpc.tournament.grid_mapping_get.description: Returns the division mapping between a source and target grid version; requires an authenticated user but no workspace permission.

rpc.tournament.grid_mapping_put.description: Creates or updates the division mapping between two grid versions; requires division_grid-update permission on the source version's workspace.

rpc.tournament.grid_marketplace_grids.description: Lists importable division grids from a source workspace; requires division_grid-read on the target and access to the source workspace.

rpc.tournament.grid_marketplace_import.description: Imports selected division grids from a source workspace (copying assets via S3, 201 Created); requires division_grid-import permission on the target workspace.

rpc.tournament.grid_marketplace_workspac.description: Lists workspaces whose division grids can be imported into the target workspace; requires division_grid-read permission.

rpc.tournament.grid_version_clone.description: Clones a division grid version into a new draft (201 Created); requires division_grid-create permission on the grid's workspace.

rpc.tournament.grid_version_create.description: Creates a new version of a division grid (201 Created); requires division_grid-create permission on the grid's workspace.

rpc.tournament.grid_version_delete.description: Deletes a division grid version by id (204 no body); requires division_grid-delete permission on the grid's workspace.

rpc.tournament.grid_version_get.description: Returns one division grid version by id; requires an authenticated user but no workspace permission.

rpc.tournament.grid_version_publish.description: Publishes a division grid version; requires division_grid-publish permission on the grid's workspace.

rpc.tournament.grid_version_update.description: Updates a division grid version by id; requires division_grid-update permission on the grid's workspace.

rpc.tournament.grid_versions_list.description: Lists the versions of a division grid; requires division_grid-read permission on the grid's workspace.

rpc.tournament.grid_workspace_create.description: Creates a division grid in a workspace; requires division_grid-create permission and an authenticated user.

rpc.tournament.grid_workspace_list.description: Lists a workspace's division grids; requires division_grid-read permission and an authenticated user.

rpc.tournament.job_get.description: Returns one tournament computation job by id; requires the caller's standing-recalculate or stage-update permission on the job's tournament.

rpc.tournament.job_list.description: Lists tournament computation jobs filtered by tournament/stage/active-only with a 1-100 limit; requires stage-read permission on the scoped tournament (superusers may list unscoped).

rpc.tournament.list_encounters.description: Returns a paginated list of encounters for the search filters, with viewer-scoped fields resolved from the optional identity.

rpc.tournament.list_matches.description: Returns a paginated list of matches for the search filters within the given workspace.

rpc.tournament.list_teams.description: Returns a paginated list of teams for the filter params within the given workspace.

rpc.tournament.list_tournaments.description: Returns a paginated, sortable, searchable list of tournaments.

rpc.tournament.lookup_tournaments.description: Returns a lightweight id/name list of up to 500 most-recent tournaments, optionally filtered by workspace and league flag, for pickers.

rpc.tournament.owal_results.description: Returns OWAL league standings for the workspace, for a specific season when given or overall, normalized against the workspace division grid.

rpc.tournament.owal_seasons.description: Returns the list of available OWAL league seasons for the workspace.

rpc.tournament.owal_stacks.description: Returns OWAL league player stacks for the workspace and season, defaulting to the latest season when none is given.

rpc.tournament.reg_approve.description: Approves a registration (recording the reviewer) and broadcasts a realtime change; requires team-import permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.reg_bulk_add_balancer.description: Adds multiple registrations to the balancer with a given status, returning updated/skipped counts and broadcasting a realtime change; requires team-import permission on the tournament.

rpc.tournament.reg_bulk_approve.description: Approves multiple registrations by id, returning approved and skipped ids and broadcasting a realtime change; requires team-import permission on the tournament.

rpc.tournament.reg_check_in.description: Checks a registration in or out (per the body flag) and broadcasts a realtime change; requires team-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.reg_create_manual.description: Admin-creates a registration for a tournament (201 Created) and broadcasts a realtime change; requires team-import permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.reg_delete.description: Soft-deletes a registration (204 no body) and broadcasts a realtime change; requires team-import permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.reg_exclusion.description: Sets a registration's exclude-from-balancer flag and reason and broadcasts a realtime change; requires team-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.reg_export_users.description: Exports a tournament's approved registrations into user records and returns the result summary; requires team-import permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.reg_form_get.description: Returns a tournament's registration form config, or null if none; requires team-read permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.reg_form_upsert.description: Creates or replaces a tournament's registration form config (built-in and custom fields); requires team-import permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.reg_list.description: Lists a tournament's registrations with status metadata and per-registration OW-rank snapshots, filtered by status/inclusion/source and optionally including deleted; requires team-read permission.

rpc.tournament.reg_pub_check_in.description: Checks the calling user's own registration in, blocking when the form requires a confirmed-public OW profile that is private; requires authentication.

rpc.tournament.reg_pub_create.description: Lets a user self-register for a tournament (201 Created) after validating the form is open and the input; rejects duplicates with 409 and requires authentication.

rpc.tournament.reg_pub_form.description: Returns the public registration form (with sub-role catalog) for a tournament, or null if none; no authentication required.

rpc.tournament.reg_pub_get_me.description: Returns the calling user's registration for a tournament, or null if none; requires authentication.

rpc.tournament.reg_pub_list.description: Returns the live public registration list for a tournament with tournament-history and division grids; no authentication required.

rpc.tournament.reg_pub_update_me.description: Lets a user update their own still-pending registration after re-validating the input; requires authentication.

rpc.tournament.reg_pub_withdraw_me.description: Withdraws the calling user's own registration and returns the new status; requires authentication.

rpc.tournament.reg_rank_autofill_apply.description: Autofills registration ranks from parsed OW data, persisting changes and broadcasting a realtime change; requires team-update permission on the tournament.

rpc.tournament.reg_rank_autofill_preview.description: Previews autofilling registration ranks from parsed OW data without writing; requires team-read permission on the tournament.

rpc.tournament.reg_reject.description: Rejects a registration (recording the reviewer) and broadcasts a realtime change; requires team-import permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.reg_restore.description: Restores a withdrawn or rejected registration and broadcasts a realtime change; requires team-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.reg_set_balancer_status.description: Sets a registration's balancer status and broadcasts a realtime change; requires team-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.reg_update.description: Updates a registration's profile, roles, and statuses and broadcasts a realtime change; requires team-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.reg_user_rank_history.description: Returns a user's balancer rank history within a workspace; requires team-read permission on the query workspace_id.

rpc.tournament.reg_withdraw.description: Withdraws a registration and broadcasts a realtime change; requires team-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.regstatus_builtin_reset.description: Removes a workspace's override for a built-in registration status (204 no body), reverting to defaults; requires team-update permission.

rpc.tournament.regstatus_builtin_upsert.description: Creates or updates a workspace override (icon/color/name/description) for a built-in registration status identified by scope and slug; requires team-update permission.

rpc.tournament.regstatus_catalog.description: Returns the full registration status catalog (built-in plus custom) for a workspace; requires team-read permission on it.

rpc.tournament.regstatus_create.description: Creates a custom registration status in a workspace (201 Created); requires team-update permission on it.

rpc.tournament.regstatus_delete.description: Deletes a custom registration status by id (204 no body); requires team-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.regstatus_list.description: Lists a workspace's custom registration statuses; requires team-read permission on it.

rpc.tournament.regstatus_update.description: Updates a custom registration status by id; requires team-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.saved_view_create.description: Creates or upserts the calling user's saved encounter filter view in a workspace; requires authentication.

rpc.tournament.saved_view_delete.description: Deletes the calling user's saved encounter view by id in a workspace (204 no body); requires authentication.

rpc.tournament.saved_views.description: Returns the calling user's saved encounter filter views for the workspace; requires authentication.

rpc.tournament.sheet_get.description: Returns a tournament's registration Google Sheets feed config, or null if none; requires team-read permission on the tournament.

rpc.tournament.sheet_mapping_catalog.description: Returns the available registration field mapping catalog (optionally with sheet headers); requires team-read permission on the tournament.

rpc.tournament.sheet_players_export.description: Exports a tournament's active registrations as a players payload; requires player-read permission on the tournament.

rpc.tournament.sheet_preview.description: Previews how sample sheet rows map to registrations under the given mapping config; requires team-read permission on the tournament.

rpc.tournament.sheet_suggest_mapping.description: Reads a source sheet and suggests a column-to-field mapping with detected headers; requires team-read permission on the tournament.

rpc.tournament.sheet_sync.description: Syncs registrations from the configured Google Sheet and returns created/updated/withdrawn/skipped counts plus errors; requires team-import permission on the tournament.

rpc.tournament.sheet_upsert.description: Creates or updates a tournament's registration Google Sheets feed config; requires team-import permission on the tournament.

rpc.tournament.stage_activate.description: Activates a stage; requires stage-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.stage_activate_and_genera.description: Enqueues a combined activate-and-generate bracket job (202 Accepted), honoring an optional force flag; requires stage-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.stage_generate.description: Enqueues a bracket-generation job (202 Accepted) for the stage; requires stage-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.stage_merge.description: Merges source group stages into a target stage; requires stage-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.stage_progress.description: Returns per-stage progress for a tournament; requires stage-read permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.stage_seed.description: Seeds the given teams into a stage using the requested mode; requires stage-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.stage_wire.description: Wires a target stage's slots from a source group stage's top placements; requires stage-update permission on its workspace.

rpc.tournament.standing_recalculate.description: Schedules a durable standings-recalculation job (202 Accepted) for the tournament; requires standing-recalculate permission.

rpc.tournament.statistics_division.description: Returns average-division statistics per tournament, normalized against the workspace division grid with fallback to the global grid.

rpc.tournament.statistics_history.description: Returns per-tournament historical statistics for the workspace.

rpc.tournament.statistics_overall.description: Returns aggregate tournament statistics across the workspace.

rpc.tournament.tournament_finish.description: Toggles a tournament's legacy finished flag and returns it with stages; superuser-only.

rpc.tournament.tournament_status.description: Transitions a tournament to the requested status; requires tournament-update permission, and the force bypass is superuser-only.

algorithms.description: For kind=compute: list of v1 algorithm names to recalc (None = all). For kind=train_ml: list of model kinds ['performance','shift','standings'].
algorithms.title: Algorithms

kind.description: 'compute' (organizer-allowed) runs v1 recalc + v2 inference. 'train_ml' (superuser only) (re)trains v2 ML boosters.
kind.title: Kind

training_workspace_ids.description: Only for kind=train_ml. None trains on all workspaces; a non-empty list limits the sample to those workspace IDs.
training_workspace_ids.title: Training Workspace Ids

workspace_ids.description: Training data scope. None means all workspaces; a list limits the training sample to those workspace IDs.
workspace_ids.title: Workspace Ids

analytics.UserReadMin.description:
Minimal user fields the analytics responses need.

Only includes plain *columns* — relationship-backed fields like
``battle_tag``, ``discord``, ``twitch`` would trigger lazy IO once the
async session is detached and aren't actually consumed by the frontend
analytics surface.
analytics.UserReadMin.title: UserReadMin

app.AchievementMatchLink.description: Narrow match reference for achievement payloads.
app.AchievementMatchLink.title: AchievementMatchLink

app.AchievementTournamentLink.description: Narrow tournament reference for achievement payloads.
app.AchievementTournamentLink.title: AchievementTournamentLink

app.EncounterReadWithUserStats.description: Encounter rendered on the user encounters page.
app.EncounterReadWithUserStats.title: EncounterReadWithUserStats

app.LobbyLeaderboard.description:
Full ranked list of every player in a tournament for one stat.

Exposes the whole ranked population behind a single user's
``UserTournamentWithStats.stats[stat].{rank,total}`` so the frontend can
render a per-stat "lobby leaderboard" modal.
app.LobbyLeaderboard.title: LobbyLeaderboard

app.LobbyLeaderboardEntry.description: One player's ranked value for a single stat inside a tournament lobby.
app.LobbyLeaderboardEntry.title: LobbyLeaderboardEntry

app.MatchReadWithUserStats.description: Match within a user-scoped encounter, with the viewer's performance.
app.MatchReadWithUserStats.title: MatchReadWithUserStats

app.SocialAccountCreate.description:
Add a social identity to a user. ``username`` is the full handle
(battletag ``Name#1234``, discord name, twitch login, etc.).
app.SocialAccountCreate.title: SocialAccountCreate

app.SocialAccountUpdate.description: Update a social identity's display handle and/or url.
app.SocialAccountUpdate.title: SocialAccountUpdate

app.SocialVisibilityUpdate.description: Toggle visibility of an account in a scope (``workspace_id`` None = global).
app.SocialVisibilityUpdate.title: SocialVisibilityUpdate

app.UserEncounterTeamPlayerRef.description:
Player reference inside encounter teams — minimal id+user_id+role.

Used only by the frontend to identify which side the viewer played on
(`players.find(p => p.user_id === selfUserId)`). Renders nothing on its
own — for the full player card see `UserTournamentPlayer`.
app.UserEncounterTeamPlayerRef.title: UserEncounterTeamPlayerRef

app.UserMatchesSummary.description:
Aggregates for the Matches-tab sidebars, computed over ALL the user's
encounters (not just the current page): most-fought opponents + per-stage
win/loss record.
app.UserMatchesSummary.title: UserMatchesSummary

app.UserTournamentPlayer.description:
Player card inside `UserTournament.players` (rendered by TournamentTeamTable).

Also populated inside `UserEncounterTeamSummary.players` when the
encounter view needs to identify the viewer's row (via `user_id`).
app.UserTournamentPlayer.title: UserTournamentPlayer

app.UserTournamentSummary.description:
Tournament card shown in user profile / achievement filter lists.

Narrow projection of `models.Tournament` — only fields the frontend
actually consumes in user-scoped pages.
app.UserTournamentSummary.title: UserTournamentSummary

app.WorkspaceCustomDomainSet.description:
Body for ``set_custom_domain``. Normalization/validation of the domain
itself (FQDN shape, platform-zone rejection) happens in the service layer
via ``normalize_custom_domain`` so both this RPC and any future caller share
one source of truth for what counts as a valid custom domain.
app.WorkspaceCustomDomainSet.title: WorkspaceCustomDomainSet

app.WorkspaceMemberAutofillResult.description:
Result of the ``members_autofill_roles`` action: how many role-less
members were granted the baseline ``member`` role.
app.WorkspaceMemberAutofillResult.title: WorkspaceMemberAutofillResult

balancer.DraftBoardSnapshot.description: Single-shot spectator/captain bootstrap + realtime resume cursor.
balancer.DraftBoardSnapshot.title: DraftBoardSnapshot

balancer.DraftCaptainOrder.description: How captains are seeded into draft seats (who picks first).
balancer.DraftCaptainOrder.title: DraftCaptainOrder

balancer.DraftPoolCaptainInput.description: A captain chosen from the balancer pool (by balancer.registration id).
balancer.DraftPoolCaptainInput.title: DraftPoolCaptainInput

rank_delta_threshold.description: Absolute rank-point delta above which a player is flagged. Null disables the feature.
rank_delta_threshold.title: Rank Delta Threshold

identity.AdminSessionRead.description: Schema for superuser session inventory across all auth users.
identity.AdminSessionRead.title: AdminSessionRead

identity.ApiKeyListQueryParams.description: Query params for the workspace API-key list (GET /api-keys).
identity.ApiKeyListQueryParams.title: ApiKeyListQueryParams

identity.ApiKeyListResponse.description: Paginated API-key page plus workspace-wide status counts.
identity.ApiKeyListResponse.title: ApiKeyListResponse

identity.ApiKeyStatusCounts.description: Workspace-wide API-key status tallies (survive pagination for the metrics row).
identity.ApiKeyStatusCounts.title: ApiKeyStatusCounts

identity.AuthLinkedPlayer.description: Analytics player linked to the authenticated user.
identity.AuthLinkedPlayer.title: AuthLinkedPlayer

identity.AuthUserDetailRead.description: Schema for auth-user detail view with effective permissions.
identity.AuthUserDetailRead.title: AuthUserDetailRead

identity.AuthUserLinkedPlayerRead.description: Schema for a player account linked to an auth user.
identity.AuthUserLinkedPlayerRead.title: AuthUserLinkedPlayerRead

identity.AuthUserListQueryParams.description: Query params for the admin auth-user list (GET /rbac/users).
identity.AuthUserListQueryParams.title: AuthUserListQueryParams

identity.AuthUserListRead.description: Schema for listing auth users with assigned roles.
identity.AuthUserListRead.title: AuthUserListRead

identity.AuthUserPlayerLinkAssign.description: Schema for assigning a player account to an auth user from admin tools.
identity.AuthUserPlayerLinkAssign.title: AuthUserPlayerLinkAssign

identity.AuthUserWorkspace.description: Workspace RBAC info for authenticated user response.
identity.AuthUserWorkspace.title: AuthUserWorkspace

identity.OAuthConnectionAdminRead.description: OAuth connection with owner info for admin views.
identity.OAuthConnectionAdminRead.title: OAuthConnectionAdminRead

identity.OAuthConnectionListQueryParams.description: Query params for the admin OAuth-connections list (GET /rbac/oauth-connections).
identity.OAuthConnectionListQueryParams.title: OAuthConnectionListQueryParams

identity.PermissionListQueryParams.description: Query params for the permission inventory (GET /rbac/permissions).
identity.PermissionListQueryParams.title: PermissionListQueryParams

identity.PlayerLinkRequest.description: Request to link player to auth user
identity.PlayerLinkRequest.title: PlayerLinkRequest

permission_ids.description: List of permission IDs to assign
permission_ids.title: Permission Ids

workspace_id.description: Workspace ID for scoped roles. NULL = global role
workspace_id.title: Workspace Id

identity.RoleListQueryParams.description: Query params for the role list (GET /rbac/roles).
identity.RoleListQueryParams.title: RoleListQueryParams

permission_ids.description: List of permission IDs to assign
permission_ids.title: Permission Ids

identity.ServiceTokenRequest.description: Client credentials request for service-to-service access.
identity.ServiceTokenRequest.title: ServiceTokenRequest

identity.SessionListQueryParams.description: Query params for the admin session inventory (GET /rbac/sessions).
identity.SessionListQueryParams.title: SessionListQueryParams

identity.SessionRead.description: Logical auth session visible to the current user.
identity.SessionRead.title: SessionRead

identity.TokenApiKeyInfo.description: API key metadata returned by token validation for downstream services.
identity.TokenApiKeyInfo.title: TokenApiKeyInfo

identity.UserRoleAssign.description: Schema for assigning role to user
identity.UserRoleAssign.title: UserRoleAssign

identity.UserRoleRemove.description: Schema for removing role from user
identity.UserRoleRemove.title: UserRoleRemove

parser.DiscordChannelRead.description: Schema for reading a tournament Discord sync channel.
parser.DiscordChannelRead.title: DiscordChannelRead

parser.DiscordChannelUpsert.description:
Schema for creating or updating a tournament Discord sync channel.

guild_id and channel_id are Discord snowflakes (64-bit integers). They are
accepted as strings to avoid JavaScript float64 precision loss on the client side.
parser.DiscordChannelUpsert.title: DiscordChannelUpsert

parser.RankCollectionStats.description: Aggregated collection health for the admin dashboard.
parser.RankCollectionStats.title: RankCollectionStats

parser.RankSeries.description:
One time series for a (battle_tag, role, platform) tuple.

The frontend pivots a list of these into either grouping: fix a battle tag
and draw a line per role, or fix a role and draw a line per battle tag.
parser.RankSeries.title: RankSeries

parser.RankStatusCounts.description:
Count per RankCollectionStatus. Statuses absent in a source read stay 0.

``extra="ignore"`` so an unexpected status string can never break the read.
parser.RankStatusCounts.title: RankStatusCounts

tournament.BalancerRankAutofillStage.description:
A single source in the rank-autofill priority chain.

``lookback_tournaments`` limits ``division_history``/``analytics`` to tournaments whose number is
within the last N before the current one; ``lookback_days`` overrides the OW weekly window. The
irrelevant lookback for a given ``source`` is ignored by the service.
tournament.BalancerRankAutofillStage.title: BalancerRankAutofillStage

notify_users_when_the_tournament_ends.title: Notify Users When The Tournament Ends

tournament.MergeGroupStagesRequest.description:
Merge legacy one-group stages into one grouped stage.

``source_stage_ids`` are removed after their stage_items and stage-scoped
references are moved under the target stage from the route path.
tournament.MergeGroupStagesRequest.title: MergeGroupStagesRequest

tournament.SeedTeamsRequest.description:
Distribute teams into a stage's stage_items (groups) automatically.

``mode`` selects the distribution strategy:
- ``snake_sr`` (default) — sort by Team.avg_sr desc, snake-distribute
  across groups so each group ends up roughly equally strong.
- ``by_total_sr`` — same but sorts by Team.total_sr (raw sum).
- ``random`` — deterministic shuffle based on team.id (reproducible).
tournament.SeedTeamsRequest.title: SeedTeamsRequest

tournament.WireFromGroupsRequest.description:
Auto-wire TENTATIVE inputs in a playoff stage from a group stage.

``top`` = number of teams per group going to the upper bracket (UB).
``top_lb`` = number of teams per group going to the lower bracket (LB).
When ``top_lb=0`` (default) all teams go into the UB item only.

Total UB slots = num_groups * top; total LB slots = num_groups * top_lb.
LB positions start from ``top + 1`` in each group's standings.

``mode`` = seeding pattern. "cross" avoids same-group rematches in R1
by alternating direction per column; "snake" does plain top-down.
tournament.WireFromGroupsRequest.title: WireFromGroupsRequest
